# A dangling partitioning drive line (one endpoint strictly interior
# to the lot) does NOT split the lot: face enumeration finds no new
# closed cycle, so the single-region fallback remains.

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

# Partition endpoint (150,100) is strictly interior.
drive-line partitions
0,100
150,100
----
drive-line: 0,100 -> 150,100 partitions

generate
----
total_stalls: 208
